Question:
We will perform a Cox regression. Include participants who reported yes to a self-reported diabetes question.
1999-2010 NHANES data will be used. Exclude participants with no self reported diabetes, <18 year old, and months followup examination missing, red cell distribution missing, mortality information missing.
Predictor is red cell distribution, categorized in quartiles (Q1: <= 25%, Q2: <25 and <=50%, Q3: <50 and <=75%, Q4: >75%) 
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
Adjust for age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin. and hemoglobin.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2010

Inclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diabetes question = Yes

Exclusion Criteria:
- <18 year old
- months followup examination missing
- red cell distribution missing
- mortality information missing

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin
- hemoglobin

Predictor:
- red cell distribution, categorized in quartiles:
  Q1: <= 25%
  Q2: >25% and <=50%
  Q3: >50% and <=75%
  Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months followup examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "self-reported diabetes question"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;

UNION ALL

UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.diq_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq;

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs

UNION

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."red_cell_distribution_width",
    t4."mortality_status",
    t5."gender",
    t6."race_hispanic_origin",
    t7."hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes participants who reported 'Yes' to a self-reported diabetes question
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants less than 18 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 18;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing red cell distribution
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."red_cell_distribution_width" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing mortality information
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age at screening
-- Extract age at screening for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Extract race/Hispanic origin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Hemoglobin
-- Extract hemoglobin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hemoglobin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5 Red cell distribution
-- Extract raw red cell distribution width for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for red cell distribution width within the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q3
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_raw;

-- Assign red cell distribution width to quartile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles AS
SELECT
  r."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <= 25%'
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" > (SELECT q1 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) AND r."red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and <=50%'
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" > (SELECT q2 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) AND r."red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and <=75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "red_cell_distribution"
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_raw r;

-- 4.6 Months followup examination
-- Extract months followup examination for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.7 All-cause mortality
-- Extract all-cause mortality status for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."mortality_status" AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tas."age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  th."hemoglobin",
  trcdq."red_cell_distribution",
  tmfe."months_followup_examination",
  tacm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_at_screening tas ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tas."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_hemoglobin th ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = th."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles trcdq ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trcdq."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination tmfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tmfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality tacm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tacm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

Question:
We will perform a Cox regression. Include participants who reported yes to a self-reported diabetes question.
1999-2010 NHANES data will be used. Exclude participants with no self reported diabetes, <18 year old, and months followup examination missing, red cell distribution missing, mortality information missing.
Predictor is red cell distribution, categorized in quartiles (Q1: <= 25%, Q2: <25 and <=50%, Q3: <50 and <=75%, Q4: >75%) 
The main outcome is all-cause mortality, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable. 
Adjust for age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin. and hemoglobin.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 1999-2010

Inclusion Criteria:
- self-reported diabetes question = Yes

Exclusion Criteria:
- <18 year old
- months followup examination missing
- red cell distribution missing
- mortality information missing

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin
- hemoglobin

Predictor:
- red cell distribution, categorized in quartiles:
  Q1: <= 25%
  Q2: >25% and <=50%
  Q3: >50% and <=75%
  Q4: >75%

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months followup examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "self-reported diabetes question"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age at screening", "age at screening"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "months followup examination", "months followup examination"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_months_followup_examination;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_months_followup_examination ON temp_master_months_followup_examination (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "red cell distribution", "red cell distribution", "red cell distribution"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.cbc_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.l25_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.l25_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.cbc_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.cbc_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.lab25;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width ON temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "all-cause mortality", "mortality information"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_mortality_status;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_mortality_status AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_mortality_status ON temp_master_mortality_status (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "hemoglobin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.cbc_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.l25_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.l25_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.cbc_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.cbc_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.lab25;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl ON temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."red_cell_distribution_width",
    t4."mortality_status",
    t5."gender",
    t6."race_hispanic_origin",
    t7."hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Include participants who reported yes to a self-reported diabetes question
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with age at screening < 18 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 18;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants with missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing red cell distribution
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."red_cell_distribution_width" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing mortality information
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Hemoglobin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hemoglobin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5 Red cell distribution (Predictor)
-- Extract raw red cell distribution width for cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for red cell distribution width within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q3
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_raw;

-- Assign red cell distribution quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution_width" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <= 25%'
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and <=50%'
    WHEN "red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and <=75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "red_cell_distribution"
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_raw;

-- 4.6 Months followup examination (Outcome - Time-to-event)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.7 All-cause mortality (Outcome - Event indicator)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."mortality_status" AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tas."age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  th."hemoglobin",
  trcdq."red_cell_distribution",
  tmfe."months_followup_examination",
  tacm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_age_at_screening tas ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tas."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_hemoglobin th ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = th."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles trcdq ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trcdq."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_months_followup_examination tmfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tmfe."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality tacm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tacm."respondent_sequence_number";

The main outcome is all-cause mortality, with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable.

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "self reported diabetes", "self-reported diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" AS "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes"
FROM nhanes.diq;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age", "age at screening"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "months followup examination", "months followup examination"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_months_followup_examination;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "months_followup_examination" AS "months_followup_examination"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_months_followup_examination ON temp_master_months_followup_examination (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "red cell distribution", "red cell distribution", "red cell distribution"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.cbc_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.l25_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.l25_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.cbc_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.cbc_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "red_cell_distribution_width" AS "red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM nhanes.lab25;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width ON temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "all-cause mortality", "all-cause mortality", "mortality information"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_mortality_status;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_mortality_status AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "mortality_status" AS "mortality_status"
FROM nhanes.mortality_data;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_mortality_status ON temp_master_mortality_status (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "hemoglobin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.cbc_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.l25_b
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.l25_c
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.cbc_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.cbc_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM nhanes.lab25;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl ON temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_months_followup_examination
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_mortality_status
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t1."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t2."months_followup_examination",
    t3."red_cell_distribution_width",
    t4."mortality_status",
    t5."gender",
    t6."race_hispanic_origin",
    t7."hemoglobin_g_dl"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_red_cell_distribution_width t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_hemoglobin_g_dl t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes participants who reported yes to a self-reported diabetes question
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants with no self reported diabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" IS NULL OR f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" != 'No';

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants <18 year old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" IS NULL OR f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 18;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing months followup examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing red cell distribution
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."red_cell_distribution_width" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants with missing mortality information
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age at screening
-- Extract age at screening for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic origin
-- Extract race/hispanic origin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Hemoglobin
-- Extract hemoglobin for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_hemoglobin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."hemoglobin_g_dl" AS "hemoglobin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5 Red cell distribution
-- Extract raw red cell distribution width for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."red_cell_distribution_width"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for red cell distribution width within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "red_cell_distribution_width") AS q3
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_raw;

-- Assign red cell distribution width to quartile groups
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles AS
SELECT r."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1: <= 25%'
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" > (SELECT q1 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) AND r."red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2: >25% and <=50%'
    WHEN r."red_cell_distribution_width" > (SELECT q2 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) AND r."red_cell_distribution_width" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3: >50% and <=75%'
    ELSE 'Q4: >75%'
  END AS "red_cell_distribution"
FROM temp_red_cell_distribution_raw r;

-- 4.6 Months followup examination
-- Extract months followup examination for the cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_followup_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.7 All-cause mortality
-- Map all-cause mortality status to '1' or '0'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = 1.0 THEN '1'
    WHEN f."mortality_status" = 0.0 THEN '0'
    ELSE NULL
  END AS "all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tas."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  th."hemoglobin",
  trcdq."red_cell_distribution",
  tmfe."months_followup_examination",
  tacm."all_cause_mortality"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_age_at_screening tas ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tas."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_hemoglobin th ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = th."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_red_cell_distribution_quartiles trcdq ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trcdq."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_months_followup_examination tmfe ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tmfe."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality tacm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tacm."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;
